html:
Exclusive to:

Jungle Tree Seed is an Item dropped from Jungle trees in the Shipwrecked DLC. Jungle Tree Seeds can be planted to create Jungle Trees. They can also be used as a low-level Fuel item. Planted saplings will not appear on the Map until they have progressed into the small tree stage.

Jungle Tree Seeds can't be planted on Checkerboard Floorings, Wooden Floorings, Cobblestones, Carpeted Floorings, Rocky Turfs, Sandy Turfs, and Cave Rock Turfs. However, the Turf can be replaced after planting the Jungle Tree Seed. They also cannot be planted on ground tiles without a Turf, such as the Beach.

When chopping down trees, it should be noted that chopping down a Large Jungle Tree will provide two Jungle Tree Seeds, a Medium Jungle Tree will provide one, and a Small Jungle Tree will not provide any.

Trivia

  • Jungle Tree Seeds have an appearance similar to Pine Cones.

Gallery

  • A Jungle Tree sapling.

However, the Turf can be replaced after planting the Jungle Tree Seed. They also cannot be planted on ground tiles without a Turf, such as the Beach.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Hạt Giống Cây Rừng là Vật Phẩm rơi ra từ Cây Rừng trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Hạt Giống Cây Rừng có thể được trồng để tạo ra Cây Rừng. Chúng cũng có thể được sử dụng như một vật phẩm Nhiên liệu cấp thấp. Cây non đã trồng sẽ không xuất hiện trên Bản đồ cho đến khi chúng chuyển sang giai đoạn cây nhỏ.

'''Jungle Tree Seed''' is an [[Item]] dropped from [[Jungle Tree|Jungle trees]] in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. Jungle Tree Seeds can be planted to create Jungle Trees. They can also be used as a low-level [[Fire#Fuel Values|Fuel]] item. Planted saplings will not appear on the [[Map]] until they have progressed into the small tree stage.

Jungle Tree Seeds can't be planted on [[Checkerboard Flooring]]s, [[Wooden Flooring]]s, [[Cobblestone]]s, [[Carpeted Flooring]]s, [[Rocky Turf]]s, [[Sandy Turf]]s, and [[Cave Rock Turf]]s. However, the [[Turf]] can be replaced after planting the Jungle Tree Seed. They also cannot be planted on ground tiles without a Turf, such as the [[Beach]].

When chopping down trees, it should be noted that chopping down a Large Jungle Tree will provide two Jungle Tree Seeds, a Medium Jungle Tree will provide one, and a Small Jungle Tree will not provide any.

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Jungle Tree Seeds have an appearance similar to Pine Cones.
